tasks.task: Execute initial marketing campaign for GenreShift AI across all relevant channels
tasks.reason: Drive initial user acquisition and awareness to generate first revenue for the new game.

tasks.task: Set up analytics tracking and monitor initial performance of GenreShift AI (downloads, engagement, monetization)
tasks.reason: Understand user behavior and identify early issues or opportunities for improvement.

tasks.task: Prepare post-launch engagement plan, including community management and social media content for GenreShift AI
tasks.reason: Build and maintain a community around the new game to foster long-term retention.

recommendation: Aggressively promote GenreShift AI to establish a user base and generate initial revenue, closely monitoring early performance metrics.
